nodes.label: AI as reflective preparation tool for future behavior management
nodes.grounding_span: Usually, it is after the fact, upon reflecting on the behavior, I will look up strategies for future handling of those events.

nodes.label: AI as comprehensive information source for unfamiliar conditions
nodes.label_negative: AI as insufficient or generic information source
nodes.grounding_span: I chatted with AI to discover typical needs for children who have this condition, so that I might better prepare myself for their mental and physical needs.

nodes.label: AI as efficient initial response provider with refinement
nodes.label_negative: AI as requiring extensive back-and-forth to get useful output
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to do the ladder, present a situation then let it provide a complete response, though I do tend to refine and after the initial complete response.

nodes.label: AI suitability for administrative documentation tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI unsuitability for nuanced student interaction
nodes.grounding_span: I think it could be beneficial for SPED teachers to help with the plethora of forms and documentation that needs to be worked through regarding these students, like IEP forms and the like.

nodes.label: AI reliance on detailed contextual description
nodes.grounding_span: Some instances are too intricate to fully explain in an efficient, yet thorough way, so I would tend to use my training or ask coworkers for support.

nodes.label: Student well-being and effective support
nodes.grounding_span: to better care for our autistic or differently abled students, to understand their needs or behaviors.

nodes.label: Professional preparedness and competence
nodes.grounding_span: so that I might better prepare myself for their mental and physical needs.

nodes.label: Efficiency in task completion
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to do the ladder, present a situation then let it provide a complete response

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for preparing for new student with unfamiliar condition
nodes.grounding_span: I found it fairly beneficial because I was given specific information not only about the condition itself but also things to consider when a child with this condition is in a school setting.

nodes.label: Preference for human judgment in intricate situations
nodes.grounding_span: Some instances are too intricate to fully explain in an efficient, yet thorough way, so I would tend to use my training or ask coworkers for support.

nodes.label: Openness to AI for administrative tasks for SPED teachers
nodes.grounding_span: I think it could be beneficial for SPED teachers to help with the plethora of forms and documentation

nodes.label: Reflective after-action analysis — reviews past events to plan future strategies
nodes.grounding_span: Usually, it is after the fact, upon reflecting on the behavior, I will look up strategies for future handling of those events.

nodes.label: Contextual detail orientation — provides comprehensive situational description before seeking input
nodes.grounding_span: I usually try to describe the things that led up to the behavior, the environment in which it happened, or describe when I might typically see such a behavior.
